mapper.select: SELECT fares.departure_date AS date, MIN(fares.price) AS lowestPrice FROM ( SELECT DATE(f.departure_time) AS departure_date, f.base_price AS price FROM flight f JOIN airport da ON da.id=f.departure_airport_id JOIN airport aa ON aa.id=f.arrival_airport_id WHERE da.city=#{departureCity} AND aa.city=#{arrivalCity} AND DATE(f.departure_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND f.departure_time>NOW() AND f.publish_status='PUBLISHED' AND f.status IN ('ON_TIME','DELAYED') AND f.direct_flag=1 AND f.remaining_seats>0 UNION ALL SELECT DATE(f1.departure_time), f1.base_price + f2.base_price FROM connecting_itinerary ci JOIN flight f1 ON f1.id=ci.first_flight_id JOIN flight f2 ON f2.id=ci.second_flight_id JOIN airport da ON da.id=f1.departure_airport_id JOIN airport aa ON aa.id=f2.arrival_airport_id WHERE ci.publish_status='PUBLISHED' AND da.city=#{departureCity} AND aa.city=#{arrivalCity} AND DATE(f1.departure_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND f1.departure_time>NOW() AND f1.publish_status='PUBLISHED' AND f2.publish_status='PUBLISHED' AND f1.status IN ('ON_TIME','DELAYED') AND f2.status IN ('ON_TIME','DELAYED') AND f1.remaining_seats>0 AND f2.remaining_seats>0 AND f2.departure_time>=f1.arrival_time+INTERVAL 90 MINUTE AND f2.departure_time<=f1.arrival_time+INTERVAL 6 HOUR ) fares GROUP BY fares.departure_date ORDER BY fares.departure_date

SELECT ci.id, ci.publish_status AS publishStatus, f1.id AS firstFlightId, f1.flight_no AS firstFlightNo, da1.city AS firstDepartureCity, aa1.city AS firstArrivalCity, f1.departure_time AS firstDepartureTime, f1.arrival_time AS firstArrivalTime, f1.remaining_seats AS firstRemainingSeats, f2.id AS secondFlightId, f2.flight_no AS secondFlightNo, da2.city AS secondDepartureCity, aa2.city AS secondArrivalCity, f2.departure_time AS secondDepartureTime, f2.arrival_time AS secondArrivalTime, f2.remaining_seats AS secondRemainingSeats, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, f1.arrival_time, f2.departure_time) AS transferMinutes, LEAST(f1.remaining_seats, f2.remaining_seats) AS availableSeats, CASE WHEN ci.publish_status='PUBLISHED' AND f1.publish_status='PUBLISHED' AND f2.publish_status='PUBLISHED' AND f1.status IN ('ON_TIME','DELAYED') AND f2.status IN ('ON_TIME','DELAYED') AND f1.departure_time > NOW() AND f2.departure_time > NOW() AND f1.remaining_seats > 0 AND f2.remaining_seats > 0 AND COALESCE(s1.available_seats,0) > 0 AND COALESCE(s2.available_seats,0) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS sellable, CASE WHEN ci.publish_status<>'PUBLISHED' THEN '方案未上架' WHEN f1.publish_status<>'PUBLISHED' THEN '第一航段未上架' WHEN f2.publish_status<>'PUBLISHED' THEN '第二航段未上架' WHEN f1.status NOT IN ('ON_TIME','DELAYED') THEN '第一航段状态不可售' WHEN f2.status NOT IN ('ON_TIME','DELAYED') THEN '第二航段状态不可售' WHEN f1.departure_time<=NOW() THEN '第一航段已起飞或过期' WHEN f2.departure_time<=NOW() THEN '第二航段已起飞或过期' WHEN f1.remaining_seats<=0 OR COALESCE(s1.available_seats,0)=0 THEN '第一航段暂无余票' WHEN f2.remaining_seats<=0 OR COALESCE(s2.available_seats,0)=0 THEN '第二航段暂无余票' ELSE NULL END AS unavailableReason, ci.created_by AS createdBy, ci.created_at AS createdAt, ci.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM connecting_itinerary ci JOIN flight f1 ON f1.id=ci.first_flight_id JOIN airport da1 ON da1.id=f1.departure_airport_id JOIN airport aa1 ON aa1.id=f1.arrival_airport_id JOIN flight f2 ON f2.id=ci.second_flight_id JOIN airport da2 ON da2.id=f2.departure_airport_id JOIN airport aa2 ON aa2.id=f2.arrival_airport_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT flight_id,COUNT(*) available_seats FROM flight_seat WHERE status='AVAILABLE' GROUP BY flight_id) s1 ON s1.flight_id=f1.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT flight_id,COUNT(*) available_seats FROM flight_seat WHERE status='AVAILABLE' GROUP BY flight_id) s2 ON s2.flight_id=f2.id ORDER BY ci.created_at DESC, ci.id DESC LIMIT #{offset},#{size}
SELECT * FROM connecting_itinerary WHERE first_flight_id = #{firstFlightId} AND second_flight_id = #{secondFlightId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO connecting_itinerary(first_flight_id, second_flight_id, publish_status, created_by) VALUES(#{firstFlightId}, #{secondFlightId}, #{publishStatus}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE connecting_itinerary SET first_flight_id=#{firstFlightId}, second_flight_id=#{secondFlightId} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE connecting_itinerary SET publish_status=#{publishStatus} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM connecting_itinerary WHERE id=#{id} AND publish_status='DRAFT'
mapper.sql:
WHERE f.direct_flag=1 AND f.departure_time>NOW() AND f.status IN ('ON_TIME','DELAYED')
AND (f.flight_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR al.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR da.code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR da.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR da.city LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR aa.code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR aa.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR aa.city LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
AND f.departure_time>=#{startDate} AND f.departure_time<#{endDate}+INTERVAL 1 DAY AND f.departure_airport_id=#{departureAirportId} AND f.arrival_airport_id=#{arrivalAirportId}
AND f.id<>ff.id AND f.departure_airport_id=ff.arrival_airport_id AND f.arrival_airport_id<>ff.departure_airport_id AND f.departure_time>=ff.arrival_time+INTERVAL 90 MINUTE AND f.departure_time<=ff.arrival_time+INTERVAL 6 HOUR
mapper.select:
SELECT f.id,f.flight_no,f.airline_id,f.departure_airport_id,f.arrival_airport_id, f.departure_time,f.arrival_time,f.duration_minutes,f.base_price,f.remaining_seats,f.total_seats, f.status,f.publish_status,f.direct_flag,f.baggage_allowance,f.punctuality_rate, al.code airline_code,al.name airline_name, da.code departure_airport_code,da.name departure_airport_name,da.city departure_city, aa.code arrival_airport_code,aa.name arrival_airport_name,aa.city arrival_city FROM flight f JOIN airline al ON al.id=f.airline_id JOIN airport da ON da.id=f.departure_airport_id JOIN airport aa ON aa.id=f.arrival_airport_id JOIN flight ff ON ff.id=#{firstFlightId}
ORDER BY f.departure_time,f.id LIMIT #{offset},#{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flight f JOIN airline al ON al.id=f.airline_id JOIN airport da ON da.id=f.departure_airport_id JOIN airport aa ON aa.id=f.arrival_airport_id JOIN flight ff ON ff.id=#{firstFlightId}
